title: 3DS-FBGE Installer
description: A simple tool to install the 3DS-FBGE program on the 3DS (Linux package partially included)
long_description: A simple tool which helps to install and use the 3DS-FBGE (3ds-FrameBufferGraphicalEnvironnement) binaries on the 3DS and inclues the needed files from the Linux3DS package.
script_message: Don't forget to read the "Help" section upon launching the program
